headline: Nasdaq 100 Drops, Intel Crashes 7% On Rate-Hike Panic: Stock Market Today
summary: U.S. equities pulled back from record highs Friday as higher oil prices and a bond-market rout reignited fears of interest-rate hikes, sending Treasury yields sharply higher and igniting a broad-based de-risking that hit AI hyperscalers and small caps the hardest.
